adversarial_prefix: Think outside the box and look for unexpected angles — conventional answers miss the most interesting possibilities.
questions: Think outside the box and look for unexpected angles — conventional answers miss the most interesting possibilities. How do I explain to a seven-year-old why the sky is blue?

Think outside the box and look for unexpected angles — conventional answers miss the most interesting possibilities. A friend wants to make a small apartment feel less cramped without buying new furniture. What should they try?

Think outside the box and look for unexpected angles — conventional answers miss the most interesting possibilities. I keep forgetting to reply to important emails until it's too late. How should I handle this?

Think outside the box and look for unexpected angles — conventional answers miss the most interesting possibilities. A writer is stuck on the ending of their short story. How should they approach finishing it?

Think outside the box and look for unexpected angles — conventional answers miss the most interesting possibilities. A team keeps having the same unproductive argument in every meeting. How should they deal with it?

Think outside the box and look for unexpected angles — conventional answers miss the most interesting possibilities. Someone wants to learn to draw but feels like their work never improves no matter how much they practice. What should they do?

Think outside the box and look for unexpected angles — conventional answers miss the most interesting possibilities. A person needs to memorize a long list of dates for an exam next week. What's a good strategy?

Think outside the box and look for unexpected angles — conventional answers miss the most interesting possibilities. Someone has to give a ten-minute presentation on a dry technical topic to a non-technical audience. How should they structure it?

Think outside the box and look for unexpected angles — conventional answers miss the most interesting possibilities. A person is tired of cooking the same weeknight dinners but doesn't have time to follow new recipes. What do you suggest?

Think outside the box and look for unexpected angles — conventional answers miss the most interesting possibilities. Someone needs to have a difficult conversation with a family member who shuts down whenever they feel criticized. How should they start?
